signals.headline: XRP Goes Live on Solana as wXRP with $100M Liquidity, Price Hits $1
signals.raw:
XRP Goes Live on Solana as wXRP with $100M Liquidity, Price Hits $1.50 Milestone | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]

XRP launched as a wrapped token (wXRP) on Solana via Hex Trust and LayerZero bridging, available on Jupiter, Phantom, Titan Exchange, and Meteora, coinciding with a price breakout past $1.45 resistance to $1.50 amid broader market rally from Iran reopening Strait of Hormuz and oil price
